title: Agriculture in Iron Age Israel
author: Oded Borowski
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted monograph. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Standard study of Iron Age agricultural practice: field crops (wheat, barley), terracing, threshing floors, storage, and the agricultural calendar. Anchor for field plots, threshing floor, and subsistence claims.
confidenceNotes: Card seeded from team knowledge; page-level citations to be added during the citation verification pass (M1).
